title: Scape & Run Modernity - SRP Texture Updated
description: Updated textures for vanilla SRP in the style of modern textures
body:
Description

📖About

SRP Modernity is a resource pack that updates  textures for Scape & Run: Parasites in the style of modern Minecraft since 1.14 (Village & Pillage Update).

This resource pack is a spiritual successor to  Thomas' old "SRP Retextured" reworked from the ground up. While vanilla SRP is our primary focus,  numerous addons will be worked on in the future.

✉️Credits

Thomas Lovlin as the creator of the pack and created the  majority of the textures in V1.

Vanity Project for help  and feedback for the textures, publication of the pack and  handing from the project past V1.

Dhanatry for Scape & Run: Parasites

❗️FAQ

Q: Is it compatable with older or newer versions?

A: Currently on 1.9.21, but can work on older versions down to 1.9.6. Future versions are uncertain.

Q: Will you adapt addons like NoCubes, Extras, Meshi, Hermit's Arsenal etc?

A: Yes, but currently vanilla SRP will be the primary focus, they will have seperate pages.

Q: Can I use it in modpacks?

A: Yes, you are allowed to use it in various modpacks.
